error_codes.description: An unspecified error has occurred
An invalid VarType has been used
The command was not recognized
Unknown register
Register is read-only
Communication mode invalid
An argument has an unexpected value
Command exceeds maximum length
The command has timed out
Cannot reserve the memory needed for this var
Cannot run a script without loading one first
An overflow has occurred while averaging a measured value
The given potential is not valid
A variable has become either "NaN" or "inf"
The input frequency is invalid
The input amplitude is invalid
Cannot perform OCP measurement when cell on
CRC invalid
An error has occurred while reading / writing flash
The specified flash address is not valid for this device
The device settings have been corrupted
Authentication error
Calibration invalid
This command or part of this command is not supported by the current device
Step Potential cannot be negative for this technique
Pulse Potential cannot be negative for this technique
Amplitude cannot be negative for this technique
Product is not licensed for this technique
Cannot have more than one high speed and/or max range mode enabled
The specified PGStat mode is not supported
Channel set to be used as Poly WE is not configured as Poly WE
Command is invalid for the selected PGStat mode
The maximum number of vars to measure has been exceeded
The specified PAD mode is unknown
An error has occurred during a file operation
Cannot open file, a file with this name already exists
Variable divided by zero
GPIO pin mode is not known by the device
GPIO configuration is incompatible with the selected operation
CRC of received line was incorrect (CRC16-ext)
ID of received line was not the expected value (CRC16-ext)
Received line was too short to extract a header (CRC16-ext)
Settings are not initialized
Channel is not available for this device
Calibration process has failed
Critical cell overload, aborting measurement to prevent damage.
FLASH ECC error has occurred
Flash program operation failed
Flash Erase operation failed
Flash page/block is locked
Flash write operation on protected memory
Flash is busy executing last command.
Operation failed because block was marked as bad
The specified address is not valid
An error has occurred while attempting to mount the filesystem
An error has occurred while attempting to format the filesystem memory
A timeout has occurred during SPI communication
A timeout has occurred somewhere
The calibrations registers are locked, write actions not allowed.
Memory module not supported.
Flash memory format not recognized or supported.
This register is locked for current permission level.
Register is write-only
Command requires additional initialization
Configuration not valid for this command
The multiplexer was not found.
The filesystem has to be mounted to complete this action.
This device is not a multi-device, no serial available.
MCU register access is not allowed, only RAM and peripherals are accessible.
Runtime (comm) command argument too short to be valid.
Runtime (comm) command argument has an invalid format.
Hibernate wake up source is invalid
Hibernate requires at least one wake up source, none was given.
Wake pin for hibernate not configured as input
The code provided to the permission register was not valid.
An overrun error occurred on a communication interface (e.g. UART).
Argument length incorrect for this register.
The GPIO pins requested to change do not exist on this instrument.
The selected GPIO pin mode is not allowed (by NVM config or device type).
The on-board flash module has timed out.
Timing error during fast measurement (possibly caused by communication).
The instrument cannot meet the requested measurement timing.
The variable type is already being measured.
The COMM command expected an hexadecimal value, but received something else.
The COMM command expected a decimal value, but received something else.
The provided key does not fit the lock on this register.
I2C port expander did not acknowledge a command
Filesystem module not supported
The IP address is not available (yet).
There is no measurement channel left for the requested measurement.
Temperature measurements during EIS with > 8 kHz are not supported.
The specified mode is unknown
The ADXL367 did not acknowledge an I2C command
An unexpected error occurred during an I2C operation.
I2C bus timeout during I2C operation (probably caused by I2C target device).
The CE is oscillating.
The script command is unknown
An unexpected character was encountered
The script is too large for the internal script memory
This optional argument is not valid for this command
The stored script is generated for an older firmware version and cannot be run
Measurement loops cannot be placed inside other measurement loops
Command not supported in current situation
Scope depth too large
The command had an invalid effect on scope depth
Array index out of bounds
I2C interface was not initialized with i2c_config command
This is an error, NAck flag not handled by script
Something unexpected went wrong.
I2C clock frequency not supported by hardware
Non integer SI vars cannot be parsed from hex or binary representation
RTC was selected as wake-up source and selected time is not supported
The script has ended unexpectedly.
The script command is only valid for a multichannel (combined) device
The script command cannot be called from within a measurement loop.
the pck sequence is called wrong
The maximum amounts of variables per packet has been exceeded.
The file path is too long for the file system.
A timeout has occurred for one of the script commands
The mux is not initialized/configured.
Measurement loop timing is too fast to use with multiplexer
The script command is only valid for a device with iR compensation
The resistance value is to big for the whole autorange range
The resistance value is to big for current current range
The variable already exists when declared
This command requires the cell to be enabled with the cell_on command
This command requires the cell to be disabled with the cell_off comma
The technique requires that at least one step should be made
The variable names do not fit in memory anymore, try using shorter names.
The variable name did not start with 'a'-'z' or otherwise contained anything other than 'a'-'z', '0'-'9' and '_'.
The variable name is too long to be processed.
The file mode is invalid.
The file mode does not support a counter in the file path.
The file path with the maximum counter value already exists.
There are too many files open already.
The specified multi device type is not defined.
Cannot set the potential (or potential range) within the active measurement loop.
Cannot set the current (or current range) within the active measurement loop.
The used feature is not licensed on this product.
The given filter type is unknown or not supported.
MScript argument value cannot be negative for this command
MScript argument value cannot be positive for this command
MScript argument value cannot be zero for this command
MScript argument value must be negative for this command (also not zero)
MScript argument value must be positive for this command (also not zero)
MScript argument value is outside the allowed bounds for this command

MScript argument datatype (float/int) is invalid for this command
MScript argument reference was invalid (not 'a' - 'z')
MScript argument variable type is invalid or not supported for this command
An unexpected, additional, (optional) MScript argument was provided
MScript argument variable is not declared
MScript argument is of type var, which is not supported by this command
MScript argument is of type literal, which is not supported by this command
MScript argument is of type array, which is not supported by this command
MScript argument array size is insufficient
An f-string contains an opening brace that is never closed
